qa.question: When was the membrane experiment completed?
Why did the first experiment fail?
What did Raven change before repeating the experiment?

session_1.speaker: Raven
session_1.text: I completed the membrane experiment yesterday.

session_1.speaker: Raven
session_1.text: The first experiment failed because the solvent evaporated too quickly.

session_2.speaker: Raven
session_2.text: I changed the solvent and repeated the membrane experiment today.

session_2.speaker: Morgan
session_2.text: Raven, did changing the solvent prevent rapid evaporation?

session_2.speaker: Raven
session_2.text: Yes, changing the solvent prevented rapid evaporation and the repeated experiment succeeded.

session_summary.session_1: Raven completed a membrane experiment, then explained its solvent-related failure.
session_summary.session_2: Raven changed the solvent and repeated the experiment successfully.
